items.title: Additionally, per multiple sources: the Pacers are extending a qualifying offer two-way wing Jalen Slawson. He will become a restricted free agent.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Additionally, per multiple sources: the Pacers are extending a qualifying offer two-way wing Jalen Slawson. He will become a restricted free agent.

items.title: The Indiana Pacers plan to exercise the $2.80 million team option on Micah Potter, which is fully non-guaranteed for the 2026-27 season and have extended a two-way qualifying offer to Jalen Slawson, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Pacers plan to exercise the $2.80 million team option on Micah Potter, which is fully non-guaranteed for the 2026-27 season and have extended a two-way qualifying offer to Jalen Slawson, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social.
